module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt/step orchestration and the plan queue module. The model backend implementation path now uses request naming end-to-end, and task runtime triggers initial plans through run_plan, stores PlanQueue records, routes model Answer output to task success, and keeps execution-step routing separate from session execution events.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. Internal backend implementations expose request directly instead of a send adapter.

childModules.name: plan
childModules.purpose: Owns PlanQueue, PlanRecord, and PlanError for insertion-ordered task plan storage, lookup, and completion tracking.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Defines the agent prompt interface, render_template conditional/variable rendering, and InitialPrompt variables for System, Context, NoPreviewTask, and Tools.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, the local task event worker/channel, total route_session_event dispatch policy, SessionContext storage for host System metadata, task previews, and tool previews, and task creation that forwards an already-empty TaskSignature plus the separate original request string into Task.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns the top-level agent runtime Step type re-exported by lib.rs and consumed by task runtime state and step execution helpers.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns task runtime state and step routing. Task runtime triggers initial plans through run_plan, keeps add_plan inside run_plan, allocates global step signatures for PlanQueue records, and sends task success when model output parses as Answer.
